The '''Kelavine system''' contained [[Taloraan/Legends|Taloraan]], the [[Star system/Legends|system's]] largest [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. It was not significantly explored until a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] came to Taloraan in search of [[Tibanna/Legends|tibanna gas]].

{{System-stub}}
